prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约24547→119754（断档异常）→31315→26465→47010，2025年基准约47010名，较2024年后移约20545名，主要受2025年新高 考选科模式（物理+化学/不限分组）影响，位次波动较大；本省物理类计划2021年119人、2022年135人、2023年135人、2024年131人、2025年141人；2026年（§ 7）计划164人，较2025年扩招约16.3%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年第76名，近年排名稳定在 76–77名区间，属中上游211；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；2022年曾有个别师德师风事件但已淡化；抖音综合热度未进入全国前100 名，关注度一般；安全科学与工程A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-等，矿业与安全工程领域特色鲜明，对相关专业考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、电气、人工智能等热门专业位次持续靠前；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万（较2025年物理类+历史类合计约90万大幅增加），竞争显著加剧；学校位于北京市，一线城市区位优势明显，对河南考生有较强吸引力；该校在河南招生规模较大 （物理类164人），属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次47010、2026年扩招16.3%及河南省考生大幅增加三重因素：扩招使位次后移约4600名，考生规模激增进一步推高竞争烈度，预计最低录取位次约51811名，区间51311–52311名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 24547 → 119754 (abnormal drop) → 31315 → 26465 → 47010. The 2025 baseline is about 47010, shifting back by about 20545 places compared to 2024, mainly due to the new Gaokao subject selection model (Physics + Chemistry/Unlimited grouping) in 2025, causing significant ranking fluctuations. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 119 in 2021, 135 in 2022, 135 in 2023, 131 in 2024, and 141 in 2025. In 2026 (§ 7), the plan is 164, an increase of about 16.3% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 76th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 76–77 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 Gaokao cycle is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. There was an isolated teacher ethics incident in 2022 but it has since faded. Comprehensive Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, indicating average attention. Safety Science and Engineering is A+ (top nationally), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology is A-, Civil Engineering is A-, etc. The university has distinctive features in mining and safety engineering, providing stable appeal to relevant major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence consistently have higher rankings. The total number of regular Gaokao examinees in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (a significant increase from about 900,000 total for Physics and History categories in 2025), intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city with obvious locational advantages, strongly attracting Henan examinees. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Henan (164 in Physics Category), making it a key out-of-province source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 47010, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 16.3%, and the sharp increase in Henan examinees: the expansion shifts the ranking back by about 4600 places, while the surge in examinees further intensifies competition. The predicted minimum admission ranking is about 51811, with a range of 51311–52311.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 51311–52311, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<51311), prioritize Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence. If the ranking is near the upper bound (>52311), mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. Although Safety Science and Engineering Class is in Tier 3, its discipline evaluation is A+, offering high cost-performance and worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 3294 → 19938 (abnormal gap) → 4685 → 4869 → 4542. The 2025 baseline is about 4542, with recent rankings fluctuating narrowly between 4500 and 4900, overall stable. The provincial History Category enrollment plan: 11 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 10 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 10, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 76th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, a mid-to-upper tier 211, with stable brand appeal to liberal arts students; reputation evaluation for the 2026 Gaokao cycle is neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity is average; History Category only offers English and Administrative Management majors, with narrow coverage and limited appeal; the university focuses on engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: English major social popularity is stable to slightly cooling (impact of AI translation); Administrative Management popularity is stable; total number of regular Gaokao examinees in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million, significantly increased from 2025, with the History Category examinee scale expanding simultaneously, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city location attractive to liberal arts students; History Category enrollment is only 10, a small-scale enrollment, sensitive to ranking fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4542, unchanged enrollment plan, and significant increase in Henan examinees: the plan remains unchanged but the surge in examinee numbers slightly intensifies competition; the predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 4572, with a range of 4072–5072.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category only has two majors: English and Administrative Management. With rankings within the predicted range of 4072–5072, it is recommended to apply for both majors. English requires a slightly higher ranking (4353 in 2025), while Administrative Management serves as a safety major (4542 in 2025). Rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<4072) allow a safe choice of English; rankings near the upper limit (>5072) require caution, with Administrative Management having a higher admission probability.
